name: Copilot Overlay
description: Main content area with a collapsible AI copilot side panel. Right-side drawer overlays or pushes body content. When collapsed, a floating pill button ('Ask AI') remains visible. Used for AI-assisted workflows where copilot can reference body content.

header.right_content: Copilot toggle button (Cmd+K) + actions + user avatar

body.note: Main application content area. Scrollable. When copilot mode is 'push', body width shrinks to accommodate panel.
AI chat message thread. Messages stack vertically with alternating alignment.

input.note: Chat input anchored to bottom of copilot panel. Always visible when panel is open.

collapsed_trigger.label: Ask AI
collapsed_trigger.note: Floating pill button visible when copilot is collapsed. Click or Cmd+K to open.

copilot.note: Right-side AI copilot drawer. Overlay mode: floats over body. Push mode: shrinks body width. Can reference body content for context-aware assistance.

responsive.desktop: Side panel overlay on right, body unaffected in overlay mode
responsive.mobile: Full-screen bottom sheet with drag-to-dismiss handle

guidance.copilot_purpose: Contains AI chat interface for context-aware assistance
guidance.body_purpose: Contains main application content that copilot can reference
guidance.context_passing: Copilot can read and reference body content for contextual responses
guidance.toggle_shortcut: Cmd+K opens/closes copilot panel from anywhere
guidance.collapsed_state: When closed, only a floating 'Ask AI' pill button is visible at bottom-right
guidance.overlay_vs_push: Overlay: panel floats over body content. Push: body shrinks to make room for panel
guidance.mobile_behavior: On mobile, copilot opens as a full-screen bottom sheet instead of a side panel
guidance.shell_spacing: Copilot-overlay owns the right-panel width, body inset rhythm, and trigger placement. Route content should not add extra wrappers just to compensate for the copilot column.

code.imports: Target-specific imports vary. Translate the internal_layout contract into your framework's overlay state, keyboard shortcut handling, and docked or floating copilot panel primitives.
code.example: CopilotOverlayShell(root) -> Header(primary app chrome) + Body(route content) + CopilotPanel(open as overlay or push column) + FloatingTrigger(command-palette shortcut enabled)
